objects.name: Medkit
objects.desc: A 3D model of a medical kit, modelled in Blender. Features a detailed box body with a red cross emblem and hinged lid. Use the buttons below the viewer to play the animation, toggle wireframe view, rotate the model, and control the lighting.

objects.name: Compass
objects.desc: A 3D model of a navigational compass, modelled in Blender. Features a detailed compass rose, bezel ring, and rotating needle. Use the buttons below the viewer to play the animation, toggle wireframe view, rotate the model, and control the lighting.

objects.name: Flashlight
objects.desc: A 3D model of a tactical flashlight, modelled in Blender. Features a detailed torch body with textured grip, lens housing, and on/off switch. Use the buttons below the viewer to play the animation, toggle wireframe view, rotate the model, and control the lighting.
